'''Weed-eels''' were a type of [[Color/Legends|silver]]-colored [[eel]] found in the [[Braan River]]<ref name="RC:HC" /> on the [[Temperature/Legends|temperate]] [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]]<ref name="RC:HC" /> in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places the events of ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'', which include the appearance of weed-eels, in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Weed-eels appeared in the [[2004]] novel ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact|Hard Contact]]'', the first novel in the ''[[Republic Commando]]'' series written by [[Karen Traviss]].<ref name="RC:HC" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' {{1st}}
